parameters.jsCode:
const raw = items[0]?.json || {};
const event = raw.body && typeof raw.body === 'object' && !Array.isArray(raw.body) ? raw.body : raw;
const eventPayload = event.payload;
const payload = typeof eventPayload === 'undefined' ? event : eventPayload;
const normalizedPayload = payload && typeof payload === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload) ? payload : { message: payload };
const message = normalizedPayload.message || normalizedPayload.text || normalizedPayload.body || event.message || event.text || event.body;
if (!message) throw new Error('Missing message / text / body');
const sourceUrls = Array.isArray(normalizedPayload.source_urls)
  ? normalizedPayload.source_urls
  : Array.isArray(normalizedPayload.sourceUrls)
    ? normalizedPayload.sourceUrls
    : Array.isArray(event.source_urls)
      ? event.source_urls
      : Array.isArray(event.sourceUrls)
        ? event.sourceUrls
        : [];
return [{
  json: {
    meta: {
      workflow_name: 'Owner_Intake',
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      trigger_source: event.trigger_source || raw.trigger_source || 'owner_intake_webhook',
      risk_level: event.risk_level || raw.risk_level || 'medium'
    },
    context: {
      canonical_links: [
        '[[Home]]',
        '[[04-Tasks/Workflow-Queue|Workflow Queue]]',
        '[[08-Runbooks/System/Escalation-Matrix|Escalation Matrix]]'
      ],
      constraints: [
        'Do not mutate canonical truth directly from intake',
        'Write durable work into the correct docs lane',
        'Route the work to the correct AI workflow instead of opening hidden state'
      ]
    },
    payload: {
      message: String(message),
      title: String(normalizedPayload.title || event.title || ''),
      intake_kind: String(normalizedPayload.intake_kind || normalizedPayload.intakeKind || event.intake_kind || event.intakeKind || 'auto'),
      requested_by: String(normalizedPayload.requested_by || normalizedPayload.requestedBy || event.requested_by || event.requestedBy || 'Owner'),
      priority: String(normalizedPayload.priority || event.priority || 'medium'),
      product_context_links: Array.isArray(normalizedPayload.product_context_links)
        ? normalizedPayload.product_context_links
        : Array.isArray(normalizedPayload.productContextLinks)
          ? normalizedPayload.productContextLinks
          : Array.isArray(event.product_context_links)
            ? event.product_context_links
            : Array.isArray(event.productContextLinks)
              ? event.productContextLinks
              : [],
      known_constraints: Array.isArray(normalizedPayload.known_constraints)
        ? normalizedPayload.known_constraints
        : Array.isArray(normalizedPayload.knownConstraints)
          ? normalizedPayload.knownConstraints
          : Array.isArray(event.known_constraints)
            ? event.known_constraints
            : Array.isArray(event.knownConstraints)
              ? event.knownConstraints
              : [],
      source_urls: sourceUrls.map((entry) => String(entry)).filter(Boolean),
      questions: Array.isArray(normalizedPayload.questions) ? normalizedPayload.questions.map((entry) => String(entry)) : [],
      target_sources: Array.isArray(normalizedPayload.target_sources)
        ? normalizedPayload.target_sources.map((entry) => String(entry))
        : Array.isArray(normalizedPayload.targetSources)
          ? normalizedPayload.targetSources.map((entry) => String(entry))
          : [],
      related_links: Array.isArray(normalizedPayload.related_links)
        ? normalizedPayload.related_links.map((entry) => String(entry))
        : Array.isArray(normalizedPayload.relatedLinks)
          ? normalizedPayload.relatedLinks.map((entry) => String(entry))
          : [],
      related_task_id: String(normalizedPayload.related_task_id || normalizedPayload.relatedTaskId || event.related_task_id || event.relatedTaskId || ''),
      audience: String(normalizedPayload.audience || event.audience || ''),
      channel: String(normalizedPayload.channel || event.channel || ''),
      approved_claims_link: String(normalizedPayload.approved_claims_link || normalizedPayload.approvedClaimsLink || event.approved_claims_link || event.approvedClaimsLink || ''),
      current_offer_link: String(normalizedPayload.current_offer_link || normalizedPayload.currentOfferLink || event.current_offer_link || event.currentOfferLink || ''),
      ...(typeof normalizedPayload.need_static_creatives === 'boolean' ? { need_static_creatives: normalizedPayload.need_static_creatives } : {}),
      ...(typeof normalizedPayload.needStaticCreatives === 'boolean' ? { need_static_creatives: normalizedPayload.needStaticCreatives } : {}),
      ...(typeof normalizedPayload.need_video_brief === 'boolean' ? { need_video_brief: normalizedPayload.need_video_brief } : {}),
      ...(typeof normalizedPayload.needVideoBrief === 'boolean' ? { need_video_brief: normalizedPayload.needVideoBrief } : {})
    }
  }
}];
